# Generic vocabulary that the bloom filter would otherwise flag. ONLY include
# universally-known generic identifiers here; never include real internal terms
# that happen to collide with the denylist (use the master list to remove them
# instead).
#
# One token per line; '#' begins a comment; case-insensitive.

# OpenAPI string format keywords with the "idn-" prefix (RFC 5890 internationalized
# domain names) which is generic vocabulary, not related to any internal namespace.
idn-email
idn-hostname

# Common English compounds that may collide with internal slugs at the
# letter-stream level.
identity
identifier
identification

# Generic 3-4 letter tokens whose bloom-hash MAY collide with internal slugs
# at low FP rate. Listed here so a scan over a large repo never noises on
# these universally-known words.
api
www
git
tar
gzip
zip
web
url
uri
url-encoded
add
set
get
put
del
not
new
old
log
err
end
src
dst
arg
env
ext
bin
out
key
val
ref
sub
sup
sum
abs
min
max
str
int
num
bit
all
any
one
two
six
ten
yes
crc
md5
sha
rsa
aes
ssl
tls
ssh
ftp
udp
tcp
ip6
ip4
dns
xml
csv
yml
ini
deb
rpm
exe
dll
ssh
arc
aer
apo
alis
ams
action
section
function
package
module
service
client
server
common
internal
external
public
private
admin
agent
config
default
options
runtime
extension
example
sample
